required_security_actions.reason: TIER_1 integration (DIRECT_API to SAP S/4HANA) triggers mandatory architectural review per ISP-001 §12.3. Review must cover service-account scoping, credential rotation policy, ERP role assignment, network egress controls, and audit log instrumentation.

REGULATED classification (TIER_1 integration default per ISP-001 §4) combined with ERP access requires data flow mapping identifying all regulated data types exposed through vendor's assigned ERP roles.
TIER_1 + REGULATED engagement requires security review sign-off from IT Security Manager before procurement approval gate per ISP-001 §12.3.
